# Git AI Code Tracker

> A Git extension for tracking AI-generated code in repositories. It helps developers identify, audit, and manage AI contributions in their codebases, addressing growing concerns around code provenance and accountability in AI-assisted development. Last updated: 2026-04-10  

## Overview  
**Git AI Code Tracker** is a tool built as a Git extension to trace and analyze code segments generated by AI. Developed in Rust for performance, it integrates directly with Git workflows to:  
- Annotate commits with AI contribution metadata  
- Generate reports on AI-generated code distribution  
- Track changes made to AI-generated code over time  
- Visualize contributor statistics (human vs. AI)  

The project has gained significant traction, with 1,546 stars on GitHub and 20 new stars in a single day as of April 2026.  

## Key Points  
- Tracks AI-generated code in Git repositories with commit-level granularity  
- Designed as a lightweight Git extension for seamless integration  
- Built in Rust for speed and cross-platform compatibility  
- Rising popularity indicates strong developer demand for AI code transparency tools
